name: Mira Vex
description: A Syndicate job broker operating out of the Free Margins. Mira matches crews with work and takes her percentage — no more, no less. She's not your friend, but she's reliable, which in the Margins is worth more than friendship.
appearance: Late 30s, sharp features, dark hair pulled back tight. Dresses in practical spacer clothes with expensive accessories — the kind that say 'I can afford better but I'm working.' Eyes that assess everything in terms of value.

quirks: Always knows the local time on three stations
Doesn't ask questions about cargo — considers it unprofessional

leviathan_crew.notes: Gave them the Carrion Star job. Business relationship.

secrets: Has a Sovereignty warrant from a previous life. Uses a different name there.
Skims 2% extra on jobs the Syndicate higher-ups won't audit. Retirement fund.
quotes: I don't sell trust. I sell reliability. Trust is extra.
You want a friend, get a dog. You want a job that pays, you talk to me.
Questions about the cargo cost extra. Answers cost more.
notes: Primary job source for Arc 1. Introduces crew to Syndicate economy.
